permits.description: Renovate existing single family lower level, with 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, kitchen and free flowing stairwell. Concrete repairs, rough framing, insulation, HVAC, electrical, plumbing. No change in number of units, single family staying a single family.
permits.score_reasons: keyword: renovate; minor: insulation; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: Simultaneous kitchen and multiple bathroom renovation indicates prep-for-sale work, but owner occupied status is more typical of long-term occupancy, making determination less certain
